ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sales were made */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales data */,
  "new_stores_sales" REAL /* Sales from new stores */,
  "existing_stores_sales" REAL /* Sales from existing stores */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the month */,
  "average_transaction_value" REAL /* Average transaction value */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the store manager */,
  "inventory_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum inventory capacity of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_status" TEXT /* Status in the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sales trend was recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales trend */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sales trend */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales for the month */,
  "year_over_year_growth" REAL /* Year-over-year sales growth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the region manager */,
  "region_manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the region manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, store manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the store */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., boolean, string, integer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store that owns the inventory */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store that received the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
